The Emergence of Agriculture

By Bruce D. Smith

Introduction text introducing the book about agriculture's origins.

# Page 48: (background photo of wheat)

# Page 90: (background photo of wheat)

# Page 114: (background photo of rice) Ian

# Page 144: (background photo of corn) Art

# Page 182: (background photo of corn) Art

# Bar-Yosef, Offer, and M. E. Kislev, 1989. "Early Farming"

Bibliography entry matched as a chapter.

# Crawford, Gary, 1992. "Prehistoric Plant Domestication"

Another bibliography reference treated as a chapter.

# Economic Botany 44 (Supplement).

Yet another bibliography heading.
